role: One-shot DDL applier: applies Postgres and graph-backend schema then exits.
invariants: Idempotent: all DDL is CREATE IF NOT EXISTS (doc.go)
Both Postgres and graph DDL must succeed; close errors joined via errors.Join (main.go:85,101)
Invalid PCG_GRAPH_BACKEND fails with unsupported graph backend for schema (main.go:128)
neo4jSchemaExecutor runs in write session against configured database name only (main.go:165)
failure_modes: Postgres open error: run returns before graph DDL is attempted
Graph backend open error: postgres is closed cleanly via defer before error propagates
Invalid PCG_GRAPH_BACKEND: schemaBackendFromEnv returns error before graph DDL runs
